query: SELECT u.name, u.id, c.id as cycle_id, c.status, c.due_date, c.submission_id FROM check_in_cycles c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' ORDER BY c.due_date DESC LIMIT 5;
